def sort_array(arr):
    """
    Arrange the elements of the array by the number of 1 bits in their binary representation, from smallest to largest. When two numbers have the same bit count, sort them based on their numerical value. The function must be implemented as shown below:

    >>> sort_array([-2, -3, -4, -5, -6]) == [-6, -5, -4, -3, -2]
    >>> sort_array([1, 0, 2, 3, 4]) [0, 1, 2, 3, 4]
    """
